entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: হয়। বিদ্যালয়ে প্ৰথমে ৰাজহুৱা প্ৰডাক্ট ব্যৱহাৰ কৰিব পাৰে, তাৰ পিছত বিদ্যালয়-নিৰ্দিষ্ট কৰ্মপ্ৰবাহ, গোপনীয়তা আৰু তহবিলযুক্ত প্ৰৱেশ বিকল্পসহ কাষ্টম AI শিক্ষাস্থানৰ বিষয়ে আলোচনা কৰিব পাৰে।

entries.source: Yes. Subject hubs are public pages built for learners, Google, and AI answer engines. They expose only public learning guidance and public guest-mode URLs, not private saved chats.
entries.value: হাং। Subject hubs শিক্ষাৰ্থীসকল, Google আৰু AI answer engines বাবে বনাএ গএ public pages হয়। সেই ৰৱল public learning guidance আৰু public guest-mode URLs দিখাতে হয়, private saved chats নং।

entries.source: Yes. Teachers and school leaders can use the public prompt library to evaluate learning behaviors before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: হাং। Teachers আৰু school leaders tailored school deployment পৰ চৰচা কৰিবলৈ পৰা পহলে learning behaviors ৰ মূলবাংকন কৰিবলৈ বাবে public prompt library ইসতেমাল কৰ সকতে হয়।

entries.source: Yes. The guide library links into public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards, and historical conversations.
entries.value: হাং। guide library Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards আৰু historical conversations জৈসে public guest modes পৰা link কৰে।

entries.source: Yes. The historical person mode is a learning simulation for perspective and questioning. It should not be cited as an authenticated quotation.
entries.value: হাং। historical person mode perspective আৰু questioning বাবে এক learning simulation হয়। ইসে authenticated quotation ৰ ৰূপ ত cite নং কৰা লাগে।

entries.source: Yes. The linked public learning modes open in guest mode, so learners can try explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, and more without starting from a marketing page.
entries.value: হাং। linked public learning modes guest mode ত খুলতে হয়, ইসলিএ শিক্ষাৰ্থীসকল marketing page পৰা শুৰূ কিএ নোহোৱাকৈ explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards আৰু বহুত কুছ আজমা সকতে হয়।

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: হয়। ৰাজহুৱা অতিথি শিক্ষামোডবোৰ বিনামূলীয়া প্ৰৱেশৰ বাবে ডিজাইন কৰা, যাতে শিক্ষাৰ্থীয়ে বিদ্যালয় ডিপ্লয়মেন্ট বা পেইড একাউণ্ট নোহোৱাকৈ আৰম্ভ কৰিব পাৰে।

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: হাং। public guest modes আৰু audience pages ঐসে design কিএ গএ হয় কি অভিভাৱকসকল ভৰোসা কৰিবলৈ পৰা পহলে learning behavior ক inspect কৰ সৰং।

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: হাং। public guest modes school leaders আৰু শিক্ষকসকল ক tailored school deployment পৰ চৰচা কৰিবলৈ পৰা পহলে learning experience আজমানে দেতে হয়।

entries.source: Yes. The public Homework Coach is available at /chat/homework-coach, and this subject hub links to the supporting modes and guides.
entries.value: হাং। public Homework Coach /chat/homework-coach পৰ উপলবধ হয়, আৰু ই subject hub supporting modes আৰু guides পৰা link কৰে।

entries.source: Yes. The recommended use is hints, explanations, step checks, feedback, and review prompts rather than final answers you cannot explain.
entries.value: হাং। recommended use ঐসে final answers লেনে সলনি hints, explanations, step checks, feedback আৰু review prompts বাবে হয় যিসকলক আপুনি সমঝা নং সকতে।

entries.source: Yes. Use Time Travel for context, History Cause and Effect for argument structure, Debate for counterarguments, and Source Critic for evidence boundaries.
entries.value: হাং। context বাবে Time Travel, argument structure বাবে History Cause and Effect, counterarguments বাবে Debate, আৰু evidence boundaries বাবে Source Critic ইসতেমাল কৰক।

entries.source: You are solely responsible for your conduct and any data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, links ("Content") that you submit, post, and display on the inspir platform. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses the collected data for various purposes: To provide and maintain our Service To notify you about changes to our Service To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so to provide customer support To gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our Service To monitor the usage of our Service to detect, prevent and address technical issues To fulfil any other purpose for which you provide it To carry out our obligations and enforce our rights arising from any contracts entered into between you and us, including for billing and collection To provide you with notices about your account and/or subscription, including expiration and renewal notices, email-instructions, etc To provide you with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless you have opted not to receive such information In any other way we may describe when you provide the information For any other purpose with your consent
entries.value: inspir platform পৰ আপুনিৰ দৱাৰা submit, post আৰু display কিএ গএ আপুনিৰ conduct আৰু কোনো ভী data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio আৰু video clips, links ("Content") বাবে ৰৱল আপুনি জিমমেদাৰ হয়। Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) collected data ৰ ব্যৱহাৰ ৱিভিনন উদদেশযোং বাবে কৰে: হমাৰী Service পৰদান কৰিবলৈ আৰু maintain কৰিবলৈ বাবে হমাৰী Service ত বদলাৱোং ৰ বাৰে ত আপুনিক notify কৰিবলৈ বাবে জব আপুনি চুনেং তো আপুনিক হমাৰী Service ৰ interactive features ত participate কৰিবলৈ দেনে বাবে customer support পৰদান কৰিবলৈ বাবে analysis বা valuable information ইকটঠা কৰিবলৈ বাবে তাকি হম নিজৰ Service বেহতৰ কৰ সৰং হমাৰী Service ৰ usage ক monitor কৰিবলৈ বাবে technical issues ক detect, prevent আৰু address কৰিবলৈ বাবে উস কোনো ভী অনয purpose ক পূৰা কৰিবলৈ বাবে জিসবাবে আপুনি ইসে provide কৰে billing আৰু collection সহিত আপুনিৰ আৰু হমাৰে বীচ কিএ গএ কোনো ভী contracts পৰা arising হমাৰী obligations পূৰী কৰিবলৈ আৰু নিজৰ rights enforce কৰিবলৈ বাবে আপুনিৰ account আৰু/বা subscription ৰ বাৰে ত notices পৰদান কৰিবলৈ বাবে, including expiration আৰু renewal notices, email-instructions, etc আপুনিক news, special offers আৰু হমাৰে দৱাৰা offer কিএ জানে ৱালে অনয goods, services আৰু events ৰ general information পৰদান কৰিবলৈ বাবে, যিসকলে আপুনিৰ দৱাৰা পহলে খৰীদে গএ বা পূছতাছ কিএ গএ items জৈসে হোং, জব লৈ আপুনিনে ঐসী information receive ন কৰিবলৈ ৰ ৱিকলপ নং চুনা হো কোনো ভী অনয তৰীৰ পৰা জিসে হম information provide কৰতে সময describe কৰ সকতে হয় আপুনিৰ consent সৈতে কোনো ভী অনয purpose বাবে

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: আপুনি নিজৰ real problem ৰ rough version পৰা ভী শুৰূ কৰ সকতে হয়। পহলা prompt messy হো তো ভী ঠীক হয়। শুৰূ কৰিবলৈ ৰ বাদ session level, audience, deadline আৰু style ক clarify কৰ সকতা হয়।

entries.source: You can contact our Copyright Agent via email at support@inspir.app
entries.value: আপুনি হমাৰে Copyright Agent পৰা support@inspir.app পৰ email ৰ মাধযম পৰা সংপৰক কৰ সকতে হয়

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: আপুনি Talk to a Historical Person ত ই format আজমা সকতে হয়। যদি আপুনি কোনো ৱযকতি পৰা মিলনে পৰা পহলে wider scene বিচাৰে, তো কোনো period ত visit কৰিবলৈ, constraints inspect কৰিবলৈ আৰু ফিৰ ই পূছনে বাবে Time Travel ইসতেমাল কৰক কি লোগোং ৰ পাস ৱাসতৱ ত কৌন পৰা choices থে।

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: আপুনি জানতে হয় কি Socratic AI tutor নে ৰম কিবা জব learner তীন ৰম কৰ সকতা হয়:

entries.source: You may provide us either directly at support@inspir.app or via third party sites and tools with information and feedback concerning errors, suggestions for improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, and other matters related to our Service (“Feedback”). You acknowledge and agree that: (i) you shall not retain, acquire or assert any intellectual property right or other right, title or interest in or to the Feedback; (ii) Company may have development ideas similar to the Feedback; (iii) Feedback does not contain confidential information or proprietary information from you or any third party; and (iv) Company is not under any obligation of confidentiality with respect to the Feedback. In the event the transfer of the ownership to the Feedback is not possible due to applicable mandatory laws, you grant Company and its affiliates an exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited and perpetual right to use (including copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute and commercialize) Feedback in any manner and for any purpose.
entries.value: আপুনি হমেং support@inspir.app পৰ সীধে বা third party sites আৰু tools ৰ মাধযম পৰা হমাৰী Service পৰা সংবংধিত errors, suggestions for improvements, ideas, problems, complaints আৰু অনয matters ৰ বাৰে ত information আৰু feedback (“Feedback”) দে সকতে হয়। আপুনি acknowledge আৰু agree কৰে কি: (i) আপুনি Feedback ত বা উস পৰ কঈ intellectual property right বা অনয right, title বা interest retain, acquire বা assert নং কৰকগে; (ii) Company ৰ পাস Feedback জৈসে development ideas হো সকতে হয়; (iii) Feedback ত আপুনিৰ বা কোনো third party ৰ confidential information বা proprietary information শামিল নং হয়; আৰু (iv) Feedback ৰ সংবংধ ত Company পৰ confidentiality ৰ কঈ obligation নং হয়। যদি applicable mandatory laws ৰ ৰৰণ Feedback ৰ ownership transfer কৰা সংভৱ নং হয়, তো আপুনি Company আৰু উসৰ affiliates ক Feedback ক কোনো ভী manner আৰু কোনো ভী purpose বাবে use কৰিবলৈ ৰ exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited আৰু perpetual right grant কৰে, including copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute আৰু commercialize।

entries.source: You may submit a notification pursuant to the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) by providing our Copyright Agent with the following information in writing (see 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) for further detail):
entries.value: আপুনি Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) ৰ তহত হমাৰে Copyright Agent ক লিখিত ৰূপ ত নিমনলিখিত information দেকৰ notification submit কৰ সকতে হয় (অধিক details বাবে 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) দেখেং):

entries.source: You may use Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with Terms. You agree not to use Service:
entries.value: আপুনি Service ৰ ব্যৱহাৰ ৰৱল lawful purposes বাবে আৰু Terms ৰ অনুসাৰ কৰ সকতে হয়। আপুনি agree কৰে কি Service ৰ ব্যৱহাৰ নং কৰকগে:

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights Under General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
entries.value: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) ৰ তহত আপুনিৰ Data Protection Rights

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)
entries.value: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) ৰ তহত আপুনিৰ Data Protection Rights

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights under the California Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA)
entries.value: California Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA) ৰ তহত আপুনিৰ Data Protection Rights

entries.source: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to – and maintained on – computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those of your jurisdiction. If you are located outside India and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to India and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) will take all the steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organisation or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.
entries.value: আপুনিৰ information, including Personal Data, আপুনিৰ state, province, country বা অনয governmental jurisdiction পৰা বাপ্ৰতিটো সথিত computers পৰ transfer আৰু maintain ৰ জা সকতী হয়, জহাং data protection laws আপুনিৰ jurisdiction পৰা অলগ হো সকতে হয়। যদি আপুনি India ৰ বাপ্ৰতিটো সথিত হয় আৰু হমেং information provide কৰা চুনতে হয়, তো কৃপবা ধবান দেং কি হম data, including Personal Data, ক India ত transfer কৰে আৰু ৱহাং process কৰে। ইস Privacy Policy পৰ আপুনিৰ consent আৰু উসৰ বাদ ঐসী information submit কৰা উস transfer ৰ পৰতি আপুনিৰ agreement ক দৰশাতা হয়। Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ই সুনিশচিত কৰিবলৈ বাবে সভী reasonably necessary steps উঠাএগী কি আপুনিৰ data ইস Privacy Policy ৰ অনুসাৰ securely treat কিবা জাএ, আৰু আপুনিৰ Personal Data ৰ কোনো organisation বা country ক transfer তব লৈ নং হোগা জব লৈ adequate controls মৌজূদ ন হোং, including আপুনিৰ data আৰু অনয personal information ৰ security।
